title: Prompt Example (Phase PC)
description: Single curated prompt example for the mChatAI iOS Prompt Catalog. Shipped by mchatai-source PR; synced into the endProducts Firestore collection by functions/sync-prompt-catalog.js as contentCategory='prompt'. Schema fields parallel the new fields on EndProduct.swift.

id.description: Stable slug; becomes EndProduct.id as com.mchatai.prompt.{appletId}.{id}

title.description: Short display name in gallery cards

summary.description: 1-2 sentence description shown on long-press / detail

category.description: Bucket key for tag filter UI; valid values are applet-specific

prompt.description: The actual prompt text loaded into the Make sheet on tap

modelHint.description: Optional model ID to auto-select on pick (user can still override)

previewURL.description: GCS public URL to 1024px PNG preview (image prompts); filled by PC.2 asset-gen script

previewThumbURL.description: GCS public URL to 256px thumbnail (image prompts); filled by PC.2

audioPreviewURL.description: GCS public URL to 10-15s m4a clip (audio prompts); filled by PC.2

previewDurationSec.description: Length of audio preview in seconds (audio prompts)

promptVariables.description: RESERVED FOR v2. v1 must be null. v2 will allow {key} substitution in the prompt body.

voiceHint.description: PC.10 (audio-library-speech only): OpenAI TTS voice name (alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer)

narratorRole.description: PC.10 (audio-library-speech only): free-form label for the speaking role (Narrator, Troll, etc.)

videoPreviewURL.description: PC.11 (dreamsnap-video only): GCS URL to looping mp4 preview (5-8s); filled by PC.11 asset-gen script

videoPreviewDurationSec.description: PC.11 (dreamsnap-video only): video preview length in seconds
